inputs.label: Desired Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: Your target net annual income after taxes and expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your target net annual income after taxes and expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi ve giderler sonrası hedef net yıllık geliriniz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihr angestrebtes Nettojahreseinkommen nach Steuern und Ausgaben.

inputs.label: Annual Overhead Costs
inputs.businessContext: Total yearly business expenses (software, office, insurance, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total yearly business expenses (software, office, insurance, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık toplam işletme giderleri (yazılım, ofis, sigorta vb.).

inputs.label: Billable Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of hours you can invoice clients annually, excluding non-billable time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of hours you can invoice clients annually, excluding non-billable time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterilere yıllık olarak faturalayabileceğiniz beklenen saat sayısı, faturalanmayan zaman hariç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Anzahl abrechenbarer Stunden pro Jahr (ohne nicht abrechenbare Zeit).

inputs.label: Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage added to cover business growth, reinvestment, and buffer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage added to cover business growth, reinvestment, and buffer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İş büyümesi, yeniden yatırım ve tampon için eklenen ek yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz für Geschäftswachstum, Reinvestitionen und Puffer.

inputs.label: Effective Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of income paid as taxes, used to gross-up the target income.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of income paid as taxes, used to gross-up the target income.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelirin vergi olarak ödenen tahmini yüzdesi, hedef geliri brütleştirmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Steueranteil am Einkommen, zur Bruttorechnung des Zielgehalts.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
